master.text: The spirit locker will remain accessible to the Master throughout the voyage.
The Master's course recommendation will be followed at each route fork.

purser.text: The stores will not be formally audited without cause during the voyage.
Distribution of comforts will remain at the Purser's discretion.

surgeon.text: The sick bay will not be stripped of supplies or repurposed during the voyage.
The Surgeon will be consulted before any punishment that risks serious injury.

chaplain.text: Burial rites will be observed for any man who dies on the voyage.
The men will be permitted to observe prayer before entering dangerous waters.

first_lieutenant.text: The First Lieutenant will be consulted before major disciplinary decisions are made alone.
